title: rubus papyraceus
intro: Rubus papyraceus, also known as the paper bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Rubus papyraceus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and improve digestion. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
